title: Claude Code Guide: From First Session to Multi-Agent Orchestration
description: The definitive zero-to-hero guide for Claude Code, Anthropic's agentic coding tool. Master CLAUDE.md, MCP integrations, custom skills, hooks, worktrees, agent teams, plugins, the Agent SDK, and computer use across 14 practitioner-driven chapters.

chapters.title: Introduction & Getting Started
chapters.description: Learn how Claude Code's agentic loop works, install on macOS/Linux/Windows, explore the core tool set, and complete your first AI-assisted coding session.

chapters.title: Project Context & Memory
chapters.description: Master the CLAUDE.md hierarchy, auto-memory system, path-specific rules, and context window management to get dramatically better results from Claude Code.

chapters.title: Models, Cost Economics & Permissions
chapters.description: Choose between Sonnet, Opus, and Haiku models with 1M extended context. Configure effort levels with /effort, track spending, and set up the 6-mode permission system including Auto Mode.

chapters.title: Environment Sandboxing & Customization
chapters.description: Configure Claude Code's four-tier settings hierarchy with managed-settings.d/ policy fragments, enable sandbox isolation, and customize the terminal display with --bare mode and flicker-free rendering.

chapters.title: Remote Control & Headless Automation
chapters.description: Run Claude Code from any device via remote control, automate with headless mode in CI/CD pipelines, and schedule recurring tasks with cron.

chapters.title: Model Context Protocol
chapters.description: Connect Claude Code to external tools — databases, APIs, ticketing systems — using the Model Context Protocol with stdio, HTTP, and OAuth authentication.

chapters.title: Custom Skills
chapters.description: Build reusable SKILL.md files with conditional path-based activation, content lifecycle management across compaction, and distribution through the Plugins system.

chapters.title: Hooks & Lifecycle Automation
chapters.description: Automate quality enforcement with 24 lifecycle events, conditional if-field filtering, the PermissionDenied event for auto mode integration, and defer decisions for SDK workflows.

chapters.title: Git Worktrees & Subagent Delegation
chapters.description: Parallelize development across isolated git worktree branches using built-in and custom subagents with AGENT.md persona definitions.

chapters.title: Agent Teams & Advanced Orchestration
chapters.description: Coordinate multiple Claude Code instances on shared task lists with dependency tracking and peer-to-peer communication (research preview).

chapters.title: Security & Enterprise Administration
chapters.description: Deploy Claude Code at organizational scale with Auto Mode governance, 6 permission modes, managed-settings.d/ policies, sandbox enforcement, Bash hardening, and audit compliance.

chapters.title: Plugins
chapters.description: Build shareable plugin packages with manifests, bin/ executables, userConfig, hooks, and marketplace publishing for distribution across teams and the community.

chapters.title: Agent SDK
chapters.description: Use the Python and TypeScript SDKs to embed Claude Code's agent loop, tools, and context management into production applications and CI/CD pipelines.

chapters.title: Computer Use
chapters.description: Control native desktop applications through Claude Code with per-app approval, safety-first design, and CLI or Desktop GUI setup on macOS and Windows.
